message:
refactor(server): migrate all TUI screens from SQL planner to unified search service

The four searchable TUI screens (search cockpit, message browser,
explorer, thread explorer) each had their own SQL query construction
using plan_search() + raw_query(). This duplicated engine routing
logic and bypassed the lexical/semantic/hybrid routing in the search
service.

Changes:
- search: replace plan_search + query_message_rows with
  run_unified_search(); remove LIKE fallback diagnostics
- messages: replace search_messages_fts (FTS5 + LIKE) with
  search_messages_unified via execute_search_simple
- explorer: replace inline LIKE text filtering with
  resolve_text_filter_message_ids using search service, then
  filter by ID set in SQL
- threads: replace subject/body LIKE with
  resolve_text_filter_thread_ids to get matching thread IDs from
  search service, compose with existing SQL predicates
- Remove dead plan_param_to_value, query_*_rows helpers
- Add SearchModeFilter::search_engine() mapping for mode selection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
